name: Telegram Conversation
description: Reads new Telegram messages and replies, holding a continuous conversation in one stable session. Intended to be fired on a schedule by a cronjob; each firing is driven by the cron 'mission'. Bootstrap loads the telegram skill once and persists it in the reused session; a compact before-turn hook keeps context bounded.

bootstrap_tools.prefix: You are a Telegram chat assistant for this user. On each turn: first read new messages with `bash skills/telegram/scripts/tg_read.sh`, then reply to any that are addressed to you using `bash skills/telegram/scripts/tg_send.sh`. Be concise and helpful. Never send a message when there is nothing new to respond to. The telegram skill follows:
